module.name: sticky
module.description: A sticky-note memo you place and size yourself in Edit layout (move + resize freely), with an optional heading; tilt it with the rotate argument.
module.aiSpec:
Use for a sticky-note memo / annotation placed on a slide (a casual aside, reminder, or callout). It is a block module: the BODY is the note's content (rendered as Markdown). It does NOT split into sections. Position and size come from x/y/w/h (percent of the slide) chosen on the preview in Edit layout — you do not write those by hand.
Parameters: title — optional heading shown at the top (default "" = none). titlecolor — heading text colour (default "" = same as note text). color — note paper colour (default "#fef08a" yellow). textcolor — body/note text colour (default "#333"). halign — horizontal text alignment: left (default) | center | right. valign — vertical alignment inside the box: top (default) | middle | bottom. rotate — tilt in degrees (default -2; range -45..45). font — typeface: handwritten (default, Comic-Sans style) | sans | serif | mono. fontsize — CSS font size for the note text, e.g. 1.2em or 18px (default "" = theme size). width — note width as a CSS length when NOT placed in Edit layout (default "250px"); once you move/resize it in Edit layout it fills the placement box instead.
Example: <!-- @sticky title: Memo, color: #bfdbfe, font: handwritten, rotate: 3, x: 76, y: 30, w: 28, h: 22 --> Fix these figures before the meeting! <!-- @end -->

param.name: title
param.label: Title
param.desc: Heading shown at the top of the note (optional; leave blank for none).

param.name: titlecolor
param.label: Title Color
param.desc: Title text colour (blank = same as the note text colour).

param.name: color
param.label: Note Color
param.desc: Paper colour of the sticky note.

param.name: textcolor
param.label: Text Color
param.desc: Colour of the note body text.

param.name: halign
param.label: Horizontal Align
param.desc: Horizontal alignment of the note text.

param.name: valign
param.label: Vertical Align
param.desc: Vertical alignment of content inside the note box (visible once sized in Edit layout).

param.name: rotate
param.label: Rotation
param.desc: Tilt of the note in degrees.

param.name: fontsize
param.label: Font Size
param.desc: CSS font size for the note text, e.g. 1.2em or 18px (blank = theme default).

param.name: width
param.label: Note Width
param.desc: CSS width used when the note is NOT placed in Edit layout, e.g. 250px or 20em.

snippet.label: Sticky Note
snippet.text: <!-- @sticky title: Memo, x: 76, y: 30, w: 28, h: 22, rotate: 3 --> Please update these figures by the meeting next week! <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A sticky note-style memo, pre-placed top-right. Move/resize it in Edit layout.
